summary: User Education System Phase 1 testing complete. All 8 educational empty states, Help Panel, InlineHints, and Client Portal pro tip verified. 13/19 features fully tested via UI, remaining 6 require specific data conditions (no leads, no portfolio items, no bookings).
passed_tests: Frontend: Help button (floating violet circle) visible on Dashboard (data-testid='help-button')
Frontend: Clicking help button opens Help Panel slide-in from right (data-testid='help-panel')
Frontend: Help Panel has Quick Start section with 4 items
Frontend: Help Panel has Common Questions section with 5 expandable FAQs
Frontend: Help Panel has Contact Support button (data-testid='help-contact-support')
Frontend: Help Panel closes when clicking backdrop
Frontend: QuotesTab empty state shows emoji 💰, 'No quotes yet', 'Create Quote' CTA, and pro tip (data-testid='quotes-empty-state')
Frontend: Contracts empty state shows emoji 📝, 'Protect yourself legally', 'Create Contract' CTA (data-testid='contracts-empty-state')
Frontend: Files empty state shows emoji, 'No files uploaded yet', pro tip (data-testid='files-empty-state')
Frontend: Deliverables empty state shows emoji, 'Track what you'll deliver', 'Add Deliverable' CTA (data-testid='deliverables-empty-state')
Frontend: InlineHint in AddLeadModal project type selector visible and dismissible (data-testid='hint-seen_project_type_tip')
Frontend: InlineHint in ContractsTab template selector visible (data-testid='hint-seen_contract_template_tip')
Frontend: InlineHint in QuotesTab for first quote visible (data-testid='hint-seen_first_quote_tip')
Frontend: Client Portal pro tip always visible in Details tab
Frontend: Hints are dismissible and remember state in localStorage
tests_requiring_specific_conditions: Dashboard empty state - requires 0 leads (user has 21 leads)
Portfolio empty state - requires 0 portfolio items (user has portfolio items)
CalendarView empty state - requires 0 bookings (user has bookings)
Activities empty state - tested leads have activities
critical_code_review_comments: HelpPanel.tsx properly implements slide-in animation with framer-motion
InlineHint.tsx correctly uses localStorage for dismiss state persistence
All 8 empty states have correct data-testid attributes for testing
Empty states follow consistent pattern: emoji → headline → description → CTA → pro tip
Help button uses z-50 positioning (works correctly after accepting cookies)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 testable features passed, 6 require specific data conditions)

context_for_next_testing_agent: User Education Phase 1 complete. Key data-testids: help-button, help-panel, help-panel-backdrop, help-quickstart-*, faq-*, help-contact-support, hint-seen_project_type_tip, hint-seen_contract_template_tip, hint-seen_first_quote_tip, dashboard-empty-state, portfolio-empty-state, quotes-empty-state, contracts-empty-state, files-empty-state, deliverables-empty-state, activities-empty-state, bookings-empty-state. To test Dashboard empty state, delete all leads. To test Portfolio empty state, delete all portfolio items. localStorage keys for hints: seen_project_type_tip, seen_contract_template_tip, seen_first_quote_tip.
